headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing on the Warriors' pursuit of LeBron James.

headlines.headline: Sources: Trae Young to sign 4-year, $212M deal with Wizards
headlines.description: Free agent Trae Young intends to sign a four-year, approximately $212 million deal to stay with the Wizards, with a player option in Year 4, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Jalen Brunson rookie card fetches $312,000 price tag following Finals MVP win
headlines.description: The fee, spent on a 1-of-1 numbered 2018 Panini Prizm Choice Nebula rookie card at a Fanatics Collect auction, set a new record for any Brunson card.

headlines.headline: Dusty May could set a new precedent for college coaches making an NBA jump
headlines.description: Fresh off a national title run, May could be an exception to a longtime rule -- or a sign of what's to come.

headlines.headline: Brandon Aiyuk, in limbo with 49ers, shouts 'Go Commanders'
headlines.description: In his latest Instagram video, posted by Brandon Aiyuk to his Instagram Story on Sunday night, he yells out: "Go Commanders! Go Commanders! Go commanders! Raise Hail! Take Command!"
